title: Method: set_auto_switch
description: Replaces the entire auto-switch configuration in one shot (bulk set, not per-rule CRUD): the master toggle and the full rule set. The result echoes the persisted state.

enabled.description: Master toggle. When false, the daemon ignores the rules and never auto-switches.

rules.description: Full replacement set of app-to-profile rules. Any previously stored rules are discarded.

enabled.description: Master toggle as persisted. Echoes the requested value on success.

rules.description: Rules as persisted. Echoes the requested set on success.
